title: Reimagined World Select
description: Mod that changes the way how the World Select Screen looks
body:
![Mod Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ilxqKTHS/images/a61a124c4f0d29905d0a6ea0b1ac3c9c09c51791.png)
[![Available on Curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/available/curseforge_46h.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/reimagined-world-select) [![Available on Modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/available/modrinth_46h.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/reimagined-world-select) *** _A brand new look for the World Select Screen!_
## Features: Highly Configurable
Cool Visuals
Dynamically Updating Large Icons
KubeJS Integration
Support For: Custom Info and Custom Icons ## Wiki: If you want work with custom info, or know how does custom large icons work, check out mod **[wiki](https://github.com/Inf2z/reimagined-world-select/wiki)**! ## Compatibility: Please report if you find any issues! ## Translation: At the moment RWS have translation for English and Russian. If you want to help translate this mod in your language, contribute translation in [Github](https://github.com/Inf2z/reimagined-world-select)! ## Credits: [Reimagined World Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/reimagined-world-menu) - inspired me to do RWS (also check out this mod!! :D) ## Q&A:
Can I use this mod in my modpack? You are free to include it in your modpack; no need to ask for permission or give credit! (though it's always appreciated)
Will be this mod on [X] version / modloader? Currently, a backport to 1.20.1 (Fabric/Forge) or to 1.21.x Fabric is possible but unlikely
Please add [feature] / fix [bug]! If you've found an issue or have a suggestion, please report them on the mod's GitHub Issues page!
***
[![Available on GitHub](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/available/github_46h.png)](https://github.com/Inf2z/reimagined-world-select) [![Read the Documentation](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/documentation/ghpages_46h.png)](https://github.com/Inf2z/reimagined-world-select/wiki)
